Bitcoin Bera Vault

Access automated DeFi yields on Berachain while earning rewards from Berachain, Babylon, Lombard, and Concrete.
Stats

Total TVL in Bitcoin Bera Vault

$337.3m

~ 3,578.03 LBTC

Your Balance in the Bitcoin Bera Vault

How it Works

Deposit your LBTC or wBTC

Deposit your LBTC or WBTC into the Bitcoin Bera Vault on Ethereum Mainnet

Deposits will remain locked until May 6th, 2025

Once the lockup period concludes, the vault will allow open redemptions with no further lockup periods imposed.

Deposit on Ethereum - Farm on Berachain

The vault will initially accept deposits on Ethereum exclusively. Following Berachain's launch, the funds will be bridged to Berachain and deployed into LBTC DeFi opportunities.

Deposit

Deposits into the Berachain Pre-Launch Vault are now closed.

Rewards
Berachain 1x
Lombard 5x
Babylon 1x
Concrete 5x
Kodiak 1x
Dolomite 1x
Information

Risks

The Bitcoin Bera Vault represents a basket of DeFi products containing smart contract risk and varying degrees of economic risk.

Goals

Bitcoin Bera Vault is an automated yield management solution designed to maximize BTC-denominated returns in the Berachain DeFi ecosystem.

Bridging

Deposits are sent to Boyco and bridged from Ethereum to Berachain via Lock & Mint. When you deposit, your assets are seamlessly transferred and allocated to Berachain.
